summary.en: USD liquidity is in short-term tightening mode. Net liquidity has drained $306B over two weeks — the most severe two-week drawdown of 2026. Bank reserves have broken below $3T. Fed repo lending jumped from $101M to $10.5B, an early-warning signal of funding stress. With RRP at zero, there is no buffer remaining.
summary.zh: 美元流动性处于短期紧缩状态。净流动性两周蒸发 3060 亿美元——2026 年最严峻的两周抽水。银行准备金跌破 3 万亿美元。美联储回购贷款从 1.01 亿美元跳升至 105 亿美元，是资金压力的早期预警信号。RRP 归零，没有任何缓冲空间。

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — no liquidity buffer remaining
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——流动性缓冲已完全消失

tga_note.zh: 周环比 +2274 亿美元——可能继续升至 1 万亿美元

net_liquidity_change.zh: -2150 亿美元（周环比）/ -3060 亿美元（两周）——2026 年最严峻两周抽水

details.en: The two-week net liquidity drain of $306B is the most severe of 2026. Bank reserves fell to $2.98T — below the $3T threshold and approaching the September 2019 level that triggered Fed emergency intervention. The most alarming signal: Fed repo lending jumped from $101M to $10.5B in a single week, indicating that some institutions are already experiencing funding stress. TGA may continue rising toward $1T before peaking in mid-May. Medium-term outlook improves as TGA unwinds, but near-term risk is elevated.
details.zh: 两周净流动性抽水 3060 亿美元，是 2026 年最严峻的。银行准备金降至 2.98 万亿美元——跌破 3 万亿美元门槛，接近 2019 年 9 月触发美联储紧急干预的水平。最值得警惕的信号：美联储回购贷款单周从 1.01 亿美元跳升至 105 亿美元，表明部分机构已出现资金压力。TGA 可能在 5 月中旬见顶前继续升至 1 万亿美元。中期展望随 TGA 回落而改善，但近期风险仍然偏高。

reason.en: TGA surged $227B WoW to $924B — may continue toward $1T. Net liquidity drained $306B over two weeks. Bank reserves broke below $3T at $2.98T. ON RRP at zero provides no buffer. Fed repo lending jumped from $101M to $10.5B — an early warning of funding stress. This is the most severe near-term liquidity squeeze of 2026.
reason.zh: TGA 单周暴增 2270 亿美元至 9244 亿美元——可能继续升至 1 万亿美元。净流动性两周抽水 3060 亿美元。银行准备金跌破 3 万亿美元至 2.98 万亿美元。ON RRP 归零毫无缓冲。美联储回购贷款从 1.01 亿美元跳升至 105 亿美元——资金压力早期预警。这是 2026 年最严峻的近期流动性收紧。

reason.en: 88% of reporting companies beat EPS estimates. Q1 earnings growth at 13.2%, revenue growth at 9.9% — a three-year high. These are genuinely strong fundamentals. However, Forward P/E at 20.9x has priced in significant future growth. The 'beat and drop' price reactions are a deduction — good numbers are not being rewarded, which is a yellow flag on earnings quality.
reason.zh: 88% 的报告公司超出 EPS 预期。Q1 盈利增长 13.2%，收入增长 9.9%——三年新高。这是真实强劲的基本面。但前瞻市盈率 20.9 倍已预支大量未来增长。「超预期后下跌」的价格反应是扣分项——好数字没有得到奖励，这是盈利质量的黄色警告。

reason.en: Less than 50% of S&P 500 stocks are above their 200-day MA — below the threshold for broad participation. A/D Line confirmation is mixed. Russell 2000 +2.11% is a positive breadth signal, suggesting some rotation into small caps. But overall breadth does not confirm a healthy broad-based bull market. Breadth above 60% is needed before adding risk.
reason.zh: 标普 500 中不到 50% 的股票位于 200 日均线上方——低于广泛参与的门槛。A/D 线确认存在分歧。Russell 2000 +2.11% 是正面广度信号，暗示部分资金轮动至小盘股。但整体广度未能确认健康的全面牛市。需要广度扩展至 60% 以上才考虑加仓。

reason.en: S&P 500 made a new high at 7,126, which is technically positive. However, Nasdaq's 13 consecutive up days is a statistical extreme not seen since 2009 — momentum is dangerously stretched. WTI crude's -9.41% crash signals demand concerns. 'Beat and drop' price action is spreading. The new high is real, but the setup for a mean-reversion pullback is building.
reason.zh: 标普 500 创新高至 7126，技术上是正面信号。但 Nasdaq 连涨 13 天是 2009 年以来未见的统计极端值——动能危险地过度拉伸。WTI 原油暴跌 9.41% 发出需求担忧信号。「超预期后下跌」价格行为持续扩散。新高是真实的，但均值回归回调的条件正在积累。

trading_summary.en:
50.6 — Moderate floor. Liquidity tightening, net liquidity drained $306B in two weeks. Earnings strong but priced in, beat-and-drop spreading. Breadth below 50% on 200DMA — not a healthy bull. Nasdaq 13-day streak is extreme. Sit on your hands.

Add conditions: TGA below $750B, net liquidity stable at $5.9T+, breadth above 60%, or S&P pullback to 6,700-6,800. Meet two before adding to 60-65%.
trading_summary.zh:
50.6分，Moderate 最低端。流动性紧缩，两周蒸发 $306B。盈利好但已在价格里，beat and drop 在扩散。广度不到 50%，不是健康牛市的样子。Nasdaq 连涨 13 天不追。坐在手上的时候。

加码条件：TGA 回落至 $750B 以下、净流动性企稳 $5.9T+、广度扩展到 60%+、或 S&P 回调至 6,700-6,800。满足两个再考虑加到 60-65%。

trading_quote: The best investment you can make is in yourself.

note.en: New high, but stretched — don't chase
note.zh: 创新高，但过度拉伸——不要追

note.en: 13 consecutive up days — statistical extreme since 2009
note.zh: 连涨 13 天——2009 年以来统计极端值
小幅回落，收益率曲线继续陡化

note.en: Spread +53 bps vs 10Y, steepening trend intact
note.zh: 与 10Y 利差 +53 bps，陡化趋势延续
美元偏弱，接近多周低位

note.en: Near all-time highs, safe-haven + dollar weakness
note.zh: 接近历史高位，避险需求 + 美元走弱

note.en: Crash — demand concerns, geopolitical premium unwinding
note.zh: 暴跌——需求担忧，地缘政治溢价消退
守住 $75K 阻力位上方，盘整中

note.en: Low VIX + stretched momentum = complacency risk
note.zh: 低 VIX + 过度拉伸动能 = 自满情绪风险

analysis.en: BTC is consolidating in the $76,500–$77,200 range after breaking above the key $75,000 resistance. The hold above this level is technically constructive. Fear & Greed at 58 (Neutral-Greed) indicates healthy sentiment. Exchange net outflows suggest accumulation continues. The macro environment — with liquidity tightening — is a headwind, but BTC has shown resilience. Key watch: sustained close above $77,500 would signal a continuation move toward $80,000.
analysis.zh: BTC 在突破关键 $75,000 阻力位后，在 $76,500–$77,200 区间盘整。守住该水平在技术上具有建设性。恐惧贪婪指数 58（中性偏贪婪）表明情绪健康。交易所净流出暗示积累持续。宏观环境——流动性收紧——构成逆风，但 BTC 表现出韧性。关键关注：持续收盘于 $77,500 以上将发出向 $80,000 延续的信号。

gold_silver_note.zh: 偏高——白银落后，存在追涨潜力

key_driver.zh: 避险需求 + 美元走弱

key_driver_detail.en: Central bank buying + geopolitical risk + weak DXY at 98.23
key_driver_detail.zh: 央行购金 + 地缘政治风险 + 美元走弱（DXY 98.23）

analysis.en: Gold advances +1.48% to $4,879.60, approaching all-time highs. The structural bull case remains intact: dollar weakness (DXY 98.23), persistent central bank buying from China, India, and Turkey, and geopolitical risk premium. WTI's -9.41% crash reduces inflation concerns slightly, but safe-haven demand is dominating. The gold/silver ratio at 88.5 remains historically stretched — if silver begins to catch up, it would confirm a broader precious metals bull market.
analysis.zh: 黄金上涨 +1.48% 至 $4,879.60，接近历史高位。结构性看涨逻辑依然完整：美元走弱（DXY 98.23）、中国、印度和土耳其央行持续购金、地缘政治风险溢价。WTI 暴跌 9.41% 轻微减轻通胀担忧，但避险需求仍占主导。金银比 88.5 仍处历史高位——如果白银开始追涨，将确认更广泛的贵金属牛市。

title.en: Fed Repo Lending Spike — Early Funding Stress Signal
title.zh: 美联储回购贷款跳升——资金压力早期预警

description.en: Fed repo lending jumped from $101M to $10.5B in a single week — a 100x increase. This is an early-warning signal that some institutions are experiencing funding stress. TGA may continue rising toward $1T. Bank reserves at $2.98T have broken below $3T. Net liquidity drained $306B over two weeks. The system is operating with no buffer and elevated stress indicators.
description.zh: 美联储回购贷款单周从 1.01 亿美元跳升至 105 亿美元——增加 100 倍。这是部分机构出现资金压力的早期预警信号。TGA 可能继续升至 1 万亿美元。银行准备金 2.98 万亿美元已跌破 3 万亿美元。净流动性两周抽水 3060 亿美元。系统在零缓冲和偏高压力指标下运行。

title.en: Beat-and-Drop Spreading — 93 Companies Report Next Week
title.zh: 「超预期后下跌」扩散——下周 93 家公司报告

description.en: Abbott beat estimates but fell 4% AND cut full-year guidance — a double negative. Schwab reported +30% profit growth but fell 5.2%. Goldman Sachs beat and also fell. The pattern is spreading across healthcare and financials. Next week, 93 companies report including 7 Dow components. If the beat-and-drop pattern continues at this scale, index-level pressure will mount even as aggregate earnings remain strong.
description.zh: Abbott 超预期但跌 4%，同时下调全年指引——双重负面。嘉信理财利润增长 +30% 但跌 5.2%。高盛超预期也下跌。该模式正在医疗和金融板块扩散。下周 93 家公司报告，含 7 家道指成分股。如果「超预期后下跌」模式在此规模下持续，即使整体盈利保持强劲，指数层面的压力也将积累。

title.zh: Nasdaq 连涨 13 天 + 广度低于 50%

description.en: Nasdaq's 13 consecutive up days is the longest streak since 2009 — a statistical extreme. Meanwhile, less than 50% of S&P 500 stocks are above their 200-day MA. This divergence — index making new highs while breadth is below 50% — is a classic warning sign of a narrow, fragile rally. Forward P/E at 20.9x has priced in significant growth. The combination of extreme momentum, poor breadth, and stretched valuations creates poor risk/reward for new positions.
description.zh: Nasdaq 连涨 13 天是 2009 年以来最长——统计极端值。与此同时，标普 500 中不到 50% 的股票位于 200 日均线上方。这种背离——指数创新高而广度低于 50%——是窄幅脆弱反弹的经典警告信号。前瞻市盈率 20.9 倍已预支大量增长。极端动能、广度不足和估值偏高三者叠加，新建仓位的风险回报比极差。

status.zh: 活跃——「超预期后下跌」扩散

description.en: The beat-and-drop pattern is spreading and intensifying. Abbott (healthcare) beat EPS estimates but fell 4% AND cut full-year guidance — a double negative signal. Charles Schwab (financials) reported +30% profit growth but fell 5.2%. Goldman Sachs (financials) beat and also fell. This multi-sector pattern spanning healthcare and financials is a 6-month early warning signal. When market leaders consistently sell off on good news, the market is pricing in future deterioration. Monitor next week's 93 reporting companies — particularly the 7 Dow components — for confirmation or reversal.
description.zh: 「超预期后下跌」模式正在扩散并加剧。Abbott（医疗）超预期但跌 4%，同时下调全年指引——双重负面信号。嘉信理财（金融）利润增长 +30% 但跌 5.2%。高盛（金融）超预期也下跌。这种跨越医疗和金融板块的多板块模式是 6 个月的早期预警信号。当市场龙头持续在好消息上遭到抛售，市场正在提前定价未来的恶化。密切关注下周 93 家报告公司——尤其是 7 家道指成分股——以确认或否定这一模式。

references.title: Market Data — SPX, NDX, BTC, Gold

disclaimer.en: Data sources: Yahoo Finance / FRED / U.S. Treasury / MacroMicro. For research purposes only, not investment advice.
disclaimer.zh: 数据来源：Yahoo Finance / FRED / 美国财政部 / MacroMicro。仅供研究，非投资建议。
